S.FORM: Randy Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1968, ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 5, Randy Brown, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ran*j ő≤rown s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, ran*j ő≤rown, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
